role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types (broadleaf, grasses) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings (double yellow lines) and infrastructure (utility poles).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design, camera generation) to support the hypothesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The specialists provided grounded evidence (vegetation, road markings, pole design), and the tournament effectively used this evidence to distinguish Brazil from the closest competitor (Colombia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush greenery and hills match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of tropical broadleaf and grasses match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the double yellow line and concrete pole match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the pole and image quality match the image.
